titleStmt.title: SII 27.112: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 112. (A.R. No. 245 of 1931-32.) HĀNĒHAḶḶI (same as MŪḌAKĒRI), UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying near the well in the house of Narasiṁha śāstri.

This badly damaged record registers gifts of lands probably to the maṭha built in the Sōmanātha temple by Kiṟiya Rāvu-seṭṭi brother of Aḷiya Bemmaṇṇa-seṭṭi of Handaṭi while A[ṇṇappa]-oḍeya was governing Bārakūru-rājya. All the details are, however, lost.
This is dated Śaka 1356, (1357 current), Ānanda, Mārggaśira ba. 10, Thursday corresponding to 1434 A.D., November 25.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēnamaḥ . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāra
vē . trailōkya nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyu
daya śakavarṣa 1356 saṁdu yēḷaneya vartamāna Ānaṁda saṁvatsara
mārggasira ba 10 gulu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa
pratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyaru vijayānagariya rājadhāniyalirdu sakaḷasāṁ
brājyavanu pratapālisuva kāladali Ā dēvarāya mahārāyara nirūpadiṁda Aṁ
ṇappa Oḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanu pālisuva kāladali mūṟukēri yoḷage mahā
ḷaya kēriya haṁdaṭiya baḷiya Aḷiya beṁmaṁṇa seṭiya taṁma kiṟiya rā
vu seṭiyaru śrī sōmanāthadēvara saṁnidhiyali kaṭisida maṭha dharmada bāḷa catussī
meya vivara . bhaṁḍiyapurada Oḷage da bāḷu A bāḷa
catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu hebbāruvina bāḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁ
kalu naḍava heddāriyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu bāranagaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu
baḍagalu ra heggaḍeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catu sīmeyoḷage Uḷama
kki makke bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugada yi dharmake naḍadu bā
Akki hā 6 ḍeya bāḷa catusīmeya vivara . mūḍa
lu Ariya baḷiya va Aya baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
baḍagalu paḍuvalu bāḷagaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu
baḍagalu bāḷiṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusī
meya Oḷage Uḷa bayalu mū 12 yi
gadeya cetu
sīme mūḍalu yavara gaḍiyiṁ
baḍagalu paḍuvalu baḷiyavaragaḍi
yiṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīme mu 2 yi bāḷiṁda naḍa
du baha tana mūlada bā
ḷu saṁkasada mēle naḍadu baha
lekada Ā mūḍe 3
damaged
savaṁṇa
mūḍalu gōyiṁda
dāriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
meya Oḷage
hudu ḍalu nā
riyi gaḍiyiṁ ḍalu Oḍa
galu heggaḍeya
gaḍa lekkadame
haṟu The rest of the
Digital edition of SII 27.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
